Searches did not find a binding university-wide AI policy, academic-integrity AI rule, or student AI-use lineamientos; course/catalog/news-like sources were rejected or left unused.

artifacts.claimText: ITAM's EPIC Lab describes professor-focused sessions intended to develop teaching competencies for integrating generative AI tools into the design, delivery, and follow-up of student-centered classes.

artifacts.claimText: The EPIC Lab ITAM event page lists classroom uses of generative-AI tools, including designing a GPT as a learning assistant or virtual tutor, using NotebookLM to summarize and compare professor documents, and generating class summaries with Notion AI and Elicit.

artifacts.sourceTitle: EPIC Tech: IA generativa (IA Gen) para clases centradas en el estudiante
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: El objetivo general de estas sesiones es desarrollar competencias docentes para integrar herramientas de inteligencia artificial generativa en el diseño, impartición y seguimiento de clases centradas en el estudiante, utilizando la IA como apoyo a la autonomía, la creatividad y la reflexión.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The sessions aim to develop teaching competencies for integrating generative AI tools into student-centered class design, delivery, and follow-up.

artifacts.sourceTitle: EPIC Tech: IA generativa (IA Gen) para clases centradas en el estudiante
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 7 nov | ChatGPT (GPT-5) ... Diseñar un GPT que actúe como asistente de aprendizaje o tutor virtual para su curso. 14 nov | NotebookLM ... Usar IA para resumir, comparar y generar materiales de clase a partir de documentos del profesor. 5 dic | Notion AI + Elicit ... Capturar acuerdos, dudas, próximos pasos y generar resúmenes automáticos de cada clase + Revisión de literatura.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The event lists ChatGPT/GPT-5, NotebookLM, and Notion AI + Elicit examples for learning assistance, class-material generation, class summaries, and literature review.

The staged claims are limited to teaching/training and listed classroom-use examples; no binding university-wide AI policy or academic-integrity AI rule was found in this run.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
